title: status
description: Live project state — the 'where are we' source of truth. Agents read this first each session, so its size is a per-session token cost: keep it lean. Budgets: now/next ≤3 items (≤2 lines each), shipped newest ~3; older entries just drop off — git log is the real history (no archive file). Whole file target ≤ ~150 lines. Keep it current: a stale status is worse than none. It is a snapshot, not a journal — git history is the fine-grained log.

oneLiner.description: One sentence: what the project is.

lastUpdated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) this file was last updated. Bump on every change.

now.description: What is actively in flight right now — ≤3 items, ≤2 lines each. Current focus only, not a backlog or journal: when an item ships, move it to `shipped` and remove it from here (don't let completed work accumulate).

next.description: What comes immediately after Now — ≤3 near-term items, ≤2 lines each. Not the whole roadmap (that's `milestones`).

milestones.description: Bigger checkpoints — one-clause titles. Flip `done` to true when reached; completed milestones drop their rationale (it lives in the ADR / shipped entry).

title.description: Milestone name, e.g. 'M1 — first usable slice'.

done.description: Whether this milestone has been reached.

target.description: Optional target date or period, e.g. '2026-07'. Empty string if none.

blocked.description: Active blockers and open questions only — remove an entry once it's resolved.

since.description: Optional ISO date it became a blocker.

shipped.description: Completed work, newest first — keep only the newest ~3 (just enough to orient). One line each, no run IDs / file-by-file lists (link the commit/PR/ADR instead). When it grows past ~3, drop the oldest — `git log` (and the commit links) is the full history; there is no archive file.

summary.description: What shipped, in one line — link detail via `commit`/`link` rather than narrating it here.

commit.description: Optional commit SHA. Empty string if none.

link.description: Optional URL (PR, commit, doc). Empty string if none.
